name: Xray-Visual Models: Scaling Vision models on Industry Scale Data

description: arXiv:2602.16918v2 Announce Type: replace-cross Abstract: We present Xray-Visual, a unified vision model architecture for large-scale image and video understanding trained on industry-scale social media data. Our model leverages over 15 billion curated image-text pairs and 10 billion video-hashtag pairs from Facebook and Instagram, employing robust data curation pipelines that incorporate balan...
author: Shlok Mishra, Tsung-Yu Lin, Linda Wang, Hongli Xu, Yimin Liu, Michael Hsu, Chaitanya Ahuja, Hao Yuan, Jianpeng Cheng, Hong-You Chen, Haoyuan Xu, Chao Li, Sreya Dutta Roy, Abhijeet Awasthi, Jihye Moon, Don Husa, Michael Ge, Sumedha Singla, Arkabandhu Chowdhury, Phong Dingh, Satya Narayan Shukla, Yonghuan Yang, David Jacobs, Qi Guo, Jun Xiao, Xiangjun Fan, Aashu Singh
